Game.Name: Battle Tycoon - Flash Hiders SFX (Japan) (Rev 1)
Game.plot: Battle Tycoon: Flash Hiders SFX is an Action game, developed and published by Right Stuff,which was released in Japan in 1995.Cheat: Play as Jail Lance in Versus ModeTo play as Jail Lance, enter the following commands in order at the title screen: down, down-right, right, left, up-left, up, and then the X- and A-buttons at the same time. You should hear a chime if the code was entered correctly. Jail Lance will now appear on the character select screen in versus mode.
Game.Notes: In a war torn world of magic and science, a young man by the name of Bang Vipot unwittingly thwarted the designs of an evil organization sponsoring a fighting tournament. One year later, that tournament, Battle Tycoon is happening once more, and Bang has returned to fight again.
